headline: GSK’s RSV vaccine wins broader FDA clearance
summary: The approval represents a win in what’s been a difficult regulatory environment of late for vaccine makers, and could boost uptake of a shot that’s posted flattening sales after an initially strong launch.

raw.headline: GSK’s RSV vaccine wins broader FDA clearance
raw.summary: The approval represents a win in what’s been a difficult regulatory environment of late for vaccine makers, and could boost uptake of a shot that’s posted flattening sales after an initially strong launch.

headline: 3 Healthcare Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Personal health and wellness is one of the many secular tailwinds for healthcare companies. Players catalyzing medical advancements have benefited from elevated demand, which has supported the industry’s returns lately - over the past six months, healthcare stocks have gained 3.8%, nearly mirrorring the S&P 500.
